name: Method Classification review for Ssr Assessment Stakes Boundaries Consequential Update bundle
summary: Accepted. Generation methods and evaluation methods are classified consistently: New Mexico is LLM-based training augmentation with unreported prompt details; Wang is mismatch-sampled off-topic detection; Rezayi is Qwen-generated learning-point augmentation evaluated on real learner responses; and Djagba is classroom augmentation with GPT-generated minority-class responses plus held-out real-response evaluation.

findings.claim_or_issue: The New Mexico report does not report the LLM family, prompt template, or filtering details beyond review and approval.
findings.why_it_matters: Method extraction should not infer generator details from operational use alone.
findings.recommended_action: Keep generation_model and prompt_strategy bounded to reported facts, as staged.
